case_title: ON24, INC. VS. LEARN MEDICAL CODING LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-15-2017 CONTINUED TO FEB-14-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100030661) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEARN MEDICAL CODING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEARN MEDICAL CODING LLC $9,375.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,275.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,320.80 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,195.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030807)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-14-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100028893), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. SERVED JUL-31-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEARN MEDICAL CODING LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 100029319) AS TO DEFENDANT LEARN MEDICAL CODING LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100030762) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEARN MEDICAL CODING LLC
DECLARATION OF WILLIAM WEESNER (TRANSACTION ID # 100030807) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEARN MEDICAL CODING LLC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-15-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-12-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-23-2017
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $225.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100030807) AS TO DEFENDANT LEARN MEDICAL CODING LLC
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100030807) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
